meta.title: Bible Review
meta.verseText: For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.

questions.text: Who built the ark?
questions.hint: God told him to build a big boat.
questions.explanation: God told Noah to build an ark to save his family and the animals from a great flood.

questions.text: How many days and nights did it rain during the flood?
questions.hint: It's the same number of years the Israelites wandered in the desert.
questions.explanation: It rained for 40 days and 40 nights during the great flood in Noah's time.

questions.text: Who was the first man God created?
questions.hint: His name starts with the letter A.
questions.explanation: God created Adam as the first man and placed him in the Garden of Eden.

questions.text: Who was the first woman God created?
questions.hint: She was made from Adam's rib.
questions.explanation: God created Eve as the first woman to be a companion for Adam.

questions.text: What did God create on the first day?
questions.hint: You need it to see!
questions.explanation: On the first day of creation, God said 'Let there be light' and there was light.

questions.text: David fought a giant named ___.
questions.hint: His name starts with G.
questions.explanation: Young David defeated the giant Goliath with a sling and a stone, trusting in God.

questions.text: What weapon did David use to defeat Goliath?
questions.hint: It's something you swing around your head.
questions.explanation: David used a sling and a smooth stone to defeat the giant Goliath.

questions.text: Who led the Israelites out of Egypt?
questions.hint: He parted the Red Sea.
questions.explanation: God chose Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt.

questions.text: What sea did God part for Moses and the Israelites?
questions.hint: Its name is a color.
questions.explanation: God parted the Red Sea so the Israelites could walk through on dry ground.

questions.text: Jonah was swallowed by a great ___.
questions.hint: It lives in the water and is very big.
questions.explanation: The Bible says Jonah was swallowed by a great fish when he tried to run from God.

questions.text: How many days was Jonah inside the great fish?
questions.hint: The same number of days Jesus was in the tomb.
questions.explanation: Jonah was inside the great fish for three days and three nights.

questions.text: Where was baby Jesus born?
questions.hint: It's called the City of David.
questions.explanation: Jesus was born in Bethlehem, in a manger because there was no room at the inn.

questions.text: Jesus was born in a manger.
questions.hint: A manger is a feeding trough for animals.
questions.explanation: Jesus was laid in a manger because there was no room for Mary and Joseph at the inn.

questions.text: How many disciples did Jesus have?
questions.hint: It's the same as the number of months in a year.
questions.explanation: Jesus chose 12 disciples to follow Him and learn from Him.

questions.text: Who was Jesus' mother?
questions.hint: Her name starts with M.
questions.explanation: Mary was chosen by God to be the mother of Jesus.

questions.text: What is the first book of the Bible?
questions.hint: It means 'beginning.'
questions.explanation: Genesis is the first book of the Bible and tells the story of creation.

questions.text: Daniel was thrown into a den of ___.
questions.hint: They are big cats that roar.
questions.explanation: Daniel was thrown into a den of lions, but God shut the lions' mouths and kept Daniel safe.

questions.text: God protected Daniel in the lions' den.
questions.hint: God sent an angel to help.
questions.explanation: God sent an angel to shut the lions' mouths so they could not hurt Daniel.

questions.text: What special coat did Jacob give to his son Joseph?
questions.hint: It was very colorful and beautiful.
questions.explanation: Jacob gave Joseph a special coat of many colors because Joseph was his favorite son.

questions.text: Jesus walked on ___.
questions.hint: It's something you drink and swim in.
questions.explanation: Jesus walked on water to reach His disciples' boat during a storm on the Sea of Galilee.

questions.text: What did Jesus turn water into at a wedding?
questions.hint: This was His first miracle.
questions.explanation: Jesus' first miracle was turning water into wine at a wedding in Cana.

questions.text: How many of each animal did Noah bring onto the ark?
questions.hint: A pair means this many.
questions.explanation: God told Noah to bring two of every kind of animal onto the ark.

questions.text: Who did God ask to sacrifice his son Isaac?
questions.explanation: God tested Abraham's faith by asking him to sacrifice his son Isaac, but God provided a ram instead.

questions.text: What is the Golden Rule that Jesus taught?
options: Treat others the way you want to be treated
Gold is the most important thing
questions.explanation: Jesus taught us to treat others the way we would want to be treated.

questions.text: The Bible teaches us to love our ___.
questions.hint: Jesus said this is the second greatest commandment.
questions.explanation: Jesus said the second greatest commandment is to love your neighbor as yourself.

questions.text: What gift did the wise men NOT bring to baby Jesus?
questions.explanation: The wise men brought gold, frankincense, and myrrh to baby Jesus. Silver was not one of the gifts.

questions.text: Jesus fed 5,000 people with just five loaves of bread and two ___.
questions.hint: They swim in the sea.
questions.explanation: Jesus miraculously fed 5,000 people with five loaves of bread and two fish.

questions.text: What did God place in the sky as a promise to never flood the whole earth again?
questions.hint: You see it after it rains and it has many colors.
questions.explanation: After the flood, God put a rainbow in the sky as a sign of His promise to never flood the whole earth again.

questions.text: Jesus rose from the dead after ___ days.
questions.hint: The same number of days Jonah was in the fish.
questions.explanation: Jesus rose from the dead on the third day, which we celebrate on Easter.

questions.text: What are the two main parts of the Bible called?
questions.explanation: The Bible is divided into the Old Testament and the New Testament.

termPairs.definition: A follower and student of Jesus
A story Jesus told to teach a lesson
An amazing event done by God's power
A gift from God we don't deserve
A rule or instruction from God

keyWords.hint: The book that contains God's Word
Trusting in God even when you can't see Him
God's Son who came to save us
A gift from God we don't earn
Something amazing only God can do
What God made in the beginning
He led the Israelites out of Egypt
What God does when we say sorry

story.summary: A review of key Bible stories and lessons, from creation to Jesus, reminding us of God's love, faithfulness, and the importance of following Him.

scenes.title: In the Beginning
scenes.description: God created the heavens and the earth in six days and rested on the seventh. He made Adam and Eve and placed them in the Garden of Eden.

scenes.title: Heroes of Faith
scenes.description: God called many people to do great things: Noah built an ark, Abraham trusted God, Moses led the Israelites out of Egypt, and David defeated Goliath.

scenes.title: Courage and Trust
scenes.description: Daniel trusted God in the lions' den. Jonah learned to obey God. Joseph forgave his brothers. These stories teach us that God is always with us.

scenes.title: Jesus Is Born
scenes.description: God sent His Son Jesus to be born in Bethlehem. Wise men brought gifts. Jesus grew up and chose 12 disciples to follow Him.

scenes.title: The Teachings and Miracles of Jesus
scenes.description: Jesus taught us to love others, performed amazing miracles like walking on water and feeding 5,000 people, and gave His life for us before rising again.
